8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/hacki11/ioBroker.speedport/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
